import { useAuth } from "../context/AuthContext"; import Navbar from "../components/Navbar"; import Sidebar from "../components/Sidebar"; import Loader from "../components/Loader"; function Dashboard() { const { user, token, logout, loading } = useAuth(); if (loading) { return ; } return (

Welcome {user?.firstName || user?.name} 👋

Authentication System Dashboard

{/* Profile */}
{user?.firstName?.charAt(0)}

{user?.firstName} {user?.lastName}

{user?.email}

{user?.role}
{/* Stats */}
Authentication
✅ Success
Protected Routes
Active
API
Connected
JWT Token
Valid
{/* User Information */}

User Information

Username
{user?.username}
Email
{user?.email}
First Name
{user?.firstName}
Last Name
{user?.lastName}
Role
{user?.role}
Token Status
Active
{/* Token */}

JWT Token

{token}
); } export default Dashboard;
